title: Cleanup that cannot escape its workspace
outcome: The invoking workspace is now the hard boundary for cleanup.

motivation.observed_problem: Cleanup could derive scope from unrelated maintainer state.
motivation.why_it_matters: A destructive candidate set could include another repository.

scenarios.name: An operator starts from workspace A

system_map.caption: One boundary now feeds discovery and deletion.

decisions.title: Resolve once
decisions.body: Pass the boundary into downstream mechanics.

invariants.title: Scope is stable
invariants.body: Discovery and action share one identity.

code_evidence.claim: Derive scope at the command boundary
code_evidence.explanation: Downstream cleanup receives an already-resolved workspace.

limitations: The Forge remains the source of truth for the full diff.
reviewer_prompts: Does every destructive path receive the same scope?
